prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 48.6 kg; Height 151.4 cm; BMI 21.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 6.7%; 3 months ago 6.5%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 189mg/dL; 9 months ago 152mg/dL; 6 months ago 145mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 158mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 49.3kg; 9 months ago 46.8kg; 6 months ago 48.8kg; 3 months ago 51.3kg; current 48.6kg), Height (12 months ago 151.4cm; 9 months ago 151.4cm; 6 months ago 151.4cm; 3 months ago 151.4cm; current 151.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 29U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 35U/L), AST (12 months ago 37U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 35U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.4mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.3mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.4mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 870mg/g; 9 months ago 818mg/g; 6 months ago 808mg/g; 3 months ago 597mg/g; current 654mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 122mg/dL; 9 months ago 136mg/dL; 6 months ago 124mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.21 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
